author: Selfish
text:
bl close --delivered-repo: operator override for delivery provenance

bl-7523 auto-tags delivered_repo with the running clone's origin URL. That is right for an operator running close in the clone that produced the sha, and silently wrong for a bridge clone running close on behalf of another repo (the proxy pattern). --delivered-repo <url> is the parallel of --delivered: when set it overrides the auto-tag, alone or paired with --delivered.

Plumbed through CLI -> cmd_close -> close_worktree -> populate_on_close; close_no_git ignores both flags, same as today. 5 new delivery unit tests + 2 integration tests cover all combinations. 100% coverage, clippy clean.
